description:
Create a multi-chapter Book resource in the BIO101 course (Introduction to Biology) at http://localhost/moodle (admin/Admin1234!) to serve as an online laboratory procedures manual. Name the book "Biology Lab Manual: Cell Biology Techniques" with the description "Comprehensive lab manual covering essential cell biology laboratory techniques and protocols". Configure the book to use numbered chapter formatting and ensure it is visible to students. The book must contain the following chapters and subchapters in order:

- Chapter: "Introduction to Microscopy"
  Content: "This chapter covers the proper use of compound light microscopes for biological specimen observation."
- Subchapter: "Light Microscope Operation"
  Content: "Step 1: Place the slide on the stage and secure with stage clips. Step 2: Start with the lowest power objective lens (4x)."
- Chapter: "Cell Staining Techniques"
  Content: "Biological staining methods allow researchers to visualize specific cellular structures that are otherwise transparent."
- Subchapter: "Gram Staining Protocol"
  Content: "The Gram stain is a four-step differential staining technique: crystal violet, iodine, decolorization, and safranin counterstain."
- Chapter: "Cell Culture Basics"
  Content: "Aseptic technique is useful when working with cell cultures to prevent contamination by bacteria, fungi, or other microorganisms."

metadata.book_name: Biology Lab Manual: Cell Biology Techniques

chapters.title: Introduction to Microscopy
chapters.content_snippet: proper use of compound light microscopes
